name: Dispute Resolution Mechanism
text: In the event of any dispute, controversy, or claim arising out of or in connection with this Agreement, the Parties shall first attempt to resolve the dispute amicably through good-faith negotiations. If the dispute is not resolved within a reasonable period, either Party may initiate appropriate legal proceedings or invoke arbitration, as may be applicable under this Agreement.
invalid_if: Dispute resolution mechanism is entirely absent
Clause contradicts an arbitration clause without hierarchy
Clause restricts access to courts absolutely
source: CPC Section 89 + Indian contract drafting practice
